PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: wired hooks into the committed settings.json by default and switched skills to plugin registration instead of vendoring

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: remodeled onto the fusekit detached mount-holder and made `cc-notes init` set up everything, cutting v0.5.0

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: polished the login flow — auto-close after `ccp login`, TUI re-login for unhealthy accounts, unattended widget

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-review.summary: redesigned the AI bar as the Command Deck, added keyboard shortcuts, and auto-collapsed generated files

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-runtime.summary: renamed the repo to cc-runtime and broadened its scope to harness-injected tools

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: added the agent-browser-with-cookies skill — authenticated browsing via local cookies behind a reasoned Touch ID gate

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: unified the code-correction ledger as the LLM-grounded substrate, cutting the v4.0.0 breaking release

PushEvent:yasyf/dailies.summary: built a live profile-mining dashboard and restyled the CLI on a shared rich presentation layer

PushEvent:yasyf/docker-dsl.summary: wrote the narrative guide and curated reference, added Google-style docstrings, and cut v0.1.0

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: ported the deadline-edge and darwin mount tests over from cc-pool and polished the README, cutting v0.1.1

PushEvent:yasyf/semisweet.summary: added hybrid BM25+dense retrieval plus perf wins: concurrent local inference, bounded frame reads, smaller payloads

PushEvent:yasyf/spawnllm.summary: generalized backend status checks and added a Gemini-family fallback, with a docs and changelog pass

captain-hook@v3.7.0.summary: wired hooks into the committed settings.json by default

cc-interact@v0.1.0.summary: extracted the domain-agnostic agent/daemon/web framework out of cc-review as its own library

cc-notes@v0.5.0.summary: made `cc-notes init` set up everything and moved the capt-hook manifest into .claude/

cc-pool@v0.30.1.summary: gave the menubar widget an app icon and made `ccp widget` run unattended

cc-transcript@v4.0.0.summary: unified the code-correction ledger as the LLM-grounded substrate

slop-cop@v0.1.14.summary: added --lines to report only violations within a touched range, built for agents linting edits

spawnllm@v0.2.0.summary: generalized backend status checks and added a Gemini-family fallback
